title: dendranthema japonense
intro: Dendranthema japonense, also known as Chrysanthemum, is a type of flowering plant in the asteraceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Dendranthema japonense include reducing fever, alleviating headaches, and improving digestion. Dendranthema japonense can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for consumption.
